case_title: HARRY G. LEWIS VS. STEPHEN KAFFEE et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-16-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST BRIAN S. HEALY, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-06-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-22-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-21-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT KAFFEE, STEPHEN
